subject: ref:http-caching-rfc
quote: a cache MUST use the most recent response ... determined by validators
rationale: Validator-based freshness is exactly what content-addressed, immutable keys encode.

subject: ref:http-caching-rfc
quote: A cache stores responses keyed by request target and selecting header fields
rationale: Defines the keying model the caching layer implements.

subject: ref:web-almanac
quote: the majority of pages measured ship largely static markup
rationale: Most real sites do not need server rendering by default.

subject: ref:web-almanac
quote: cache hit ratios fall when asset URLs churn on every deploy
rationale: Immutable keys can depress hit ratio across deploys unless tags are used.

subject: ref:owasp-session
quote: session identifiers should be stored in cookies with the Secure and HttpOnly attributes set
rationale: Signed, HttpOnly cookies are the recommended default for session state.
